title: onosma dalmatica var. densiflora
intro: Onosma dalmatica var. densiflora, also known as Dalmatian yellow gentian, is a perennial plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family, native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Onosma dalmatica var. densiflora are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of malaria and other infectious diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
